title: Environmental Science-1
subject: Science
description: Environmental Science-1 covers fundamental concepts of ecology, biodiversity, and natural resource management. It contains 12 lectures and 7 quizzes.

title: Environmental Science-2
subject: Science
description: Environmental Science-2 dives deeper into environmental pollution, climate change, and sustainable development. It contains 12 lectures and 7 quizzes.

title: EVS-Practical
subject: Science
description: EVS Practical contains hands-on experiments covering basic science concepts. Includes 5 lab sessions.

title: Basics of Mathematics
subject: Mathematics
description: Basics of Mathematics covers number systems, arithmetic operations, fractions, decimals, and introductory algebra. It contains 12 lectures and 7 quizzes.

title: Simplified Mathematics
subject: Mathematics
description: Simplified Mathematics makes complex math topics easy and approachable with step-by-step explanations. It contains 12 lectures and 7 quizzes.

title: English
subject: English
description: English is a global language course covering vocabulary, comprehension, story-telling, and communication skills. It contains 10 lectures and 5 quizzes.

title: English Grammar
subject: English
description: English Grammar covers parts of speech, sentence structure, tenses, punctuation and writing skills. It contains 10 lectures and 5 quizzes.

title: Hindi
subject: Hindi
description: Hindi course covers reading, writing, comprehension, and communication in Hindi language. It contains 10 lectures and 5 quizzes.

title: Hindi Vyakaran
subject: Hindi
description: Hindi Vyakaran covers grammar rules, sandhi, samas, karak, and literary forms of the Hindi language. It contains 10 lectures and 5 quizzes.
